heroHeadline: Putin Announces Orthodox Easter Ceasefire, Calls on Zelensky to Reciprocate
heroSubtitle: Russian President Putin declares a unilateral Easter ceasefire ahead of Orthodox Easter on April 20, in a significant diplomatic overture as peace talks remain stalled
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
